    "HasA": [
      "It has 25.5 centimetres in height and 5.25 meters long.",
      "It has 814 humans, 28 boats, 60 animals, 30 buildings, 20 vehicles, 8 sedan chairs, and 170 trees.",
      "It has about twenty women in the Song dynasty original.",
      "It has a river meandering through the entire length.",
      "It has a country path that broadens into a road and joins with the city road.",
      "It has a city proper with gates.",
      "It has businesses of all kinds selling wine, grain, secondhand goods, cookware, bows and arrows, lanterns, musical instruments, gold and silver, ornaments, dyed fabrics, paintings, medicine, needles, and artifacts.",
      "It has many restaurants.",
      "It has a great bridge, called the Rainbow Bridge or Shangdu Bridge.",
      "It has a boat threatening to crash into the bridge."
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "It is characterized by capturing the daily life of people and the landscape of the capital, Bianjing during the Northern Song.",
      "It is characterized by revealing the lifestyle of all levels of the society from rich to poor as well as economic activities in both rural areas and the city.",
      "It is characterized by offering glimpses of clothing and architecture.",
      "It is characterized by being the most renowned work among all Chinese paintings.",
      "It is characterized by having hundreds of replicas, copies of copies, and even forgeries made by artists of subsequent dynasties.",
      "It is characterized by being a favorite of Puyi, the last emperor of China.",
      "It is characterized by its delicate nature requiring intermittent exhibition for brief periods.",
      "It is characterized by the countryside and the densely populated city as its two main sections.",
      "It is characterized by depicting many economic activities, such as people loading cargoes onto the boat, shops, and even a tax office.",
      "It is characterized by showing people from all walks of life."
    ],

      "It was held in museums in China, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, the United Kingdom, North America, and France.",
      "It was held in the Museum of Applied Arts, Vienna in Austria.",
      "It was held in the National Palace Museum in Taipei."

      "It is known for capturing the daily life of people and the landscape of the capital, Bianjing during the Northern Song.",
      "It is known for its depiction of the spirit and worldly commotion at the Qingming Festival.",
      "It is known for revealing the lifestyle of all levels of society and economic activities.",
      "It is known for being the most renowned work among all Chinese paintings.",
      "It is known for the hundreds of replicas and copies made by later artists.",
      "It is known for being a favorite of the last emperor of China, Puyi.",
      "It is known for its detailed depiction of urban and rural life.",

  "japanese": {
    "About": [
      "それは清明節の精神と世俗の喧騒についてです。"
    ],
    "Affects": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "それは張擇端と関連があります。"
    ],
    "BelongsTo": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "BuiltBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "BuiltIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "CausedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "ComposedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "ConsistsOf": [
      "それは、裕福な層から貧しい層までの社会のあらゆる階層の人々の日常生活と、農村部と都市の両方の経済活動、そして衣類や建築の様子を明らかにします。"
    ],
    "CreatedAround": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "CreatedBy": [
      "それは張擇端によって作成されました。"
    ],
    "CreatedFor": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "CreatedIn": [
      "それは北宋時代に作成されました。"
    ],
    "CreatedTo": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "DevelopedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "DevelopedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "DirectedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "DiscoveredAt": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "DiscoveredBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "DiscoveredIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "FoundedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "FoundedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは高さ25.5センチメートル、長さ5.25メートルです。",
      "それは814人の人間、28隻の船、60頭の動物、30棟の建物、20台の乗り物、8台の駕籠、170本の木々を含みます。",
      "それは宋時代のオリジナルに約20人の女性が登場します。",
      "それは全体を蛇行する川があります。",
      "それは田舎道が広がり、道になり、街の道に合流します。",
      "それは門のある都市部があります。",
      "それはワイン、穀物、中古品、調理器具、弓矢、提灯、楽器、金銀、装飾品、染織物、絵画、薬、針、工芸品を販売するあらゆる種類のビジネスがあります。",
      "それは多くのレストランがあります。",
      "それは虹橋または、よりまれに上土橋と呼ばれる大きな橋があります。",
      "それは橋に衝突しそうな船があります。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは北宋時代の首都である汴京の、人々の日常生活と風景を捉えていることが特徴です。",
      "それは清明節の儀式的な側面ではなく、清明節の精神と世俗の喧騒をテーマとしていることが特徴です。",
      "それは裕福な層から貧しい層までの社会のあらゆる階層の人々の生活様式と、農村部と都市の両方の経済活動を明らかにし、衣類や建築の様子を垣間見せることが特徴です。",
      "それはすべての中国絵画の中で最も有名な作品として知られていることが特徴です。",
      "それは後世の王朝の芸術家によって何百もの複製、コピーのコピー、さらには偽造品が作られたことが特徴です。",
      "それは中国最後の皇帝である溥儀のお気に入りの作品であったことが特徴です。",
      "それはその繊細な性質のため、断続的に短期間のみ展示されることが特徴です。",
      "それは田園地帯と人口密集した都市という2つの主要なセクションがあることが特徴です。",
      "それは、人々が船に貨物を積み込む、店、さらには税務署などの多くの経済活動が描かれていることが特徴です。",
      "それはあらゆる階層の人々が描かれていることが特徴です。"
    ],
    "HeldIn": [
      "それは紫禁城で保管されていました。",
      "それは紫禁城の故宮博物院で保管されていました。",
      "それは中国、日本、韓国、台湾、イギリス、北米、フランスの美術館に保管されていました。",
      "それはオーストリアのウィーン応用美術館に保管されていました。",
      "それは台北の国立故宮博物院に保管されていました。"
    ],
    "HeldOn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "InfluencedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "InventedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "InventedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "IsA": [
      "それは手巻き絵巻です。",
      "それは国宝です。"
    ],
    "KnownAs": [
      "それは「中国のモナ・リザ」として知られています。"
    ],
    "KnownFor": [
      "それは北宋時代の首都である汴京の人々の日常生活と風景を捉えていることで知られています。",
      "それは清明節の精神と世俗の喧騒を描いていることで知られています。",
      "それは社会のあらゆる階層の人々の生活様式と経済活動を描いていることで知られています。",
      "それはすべての中国絵画の中で最も有名な作品であることで知られています。",
      "それは後世の芸術家によって作られた何百もの複製やコピーで知られています。",
      "それは中国最後の皇帝溥儀のお気に入りの作品であったことで知られています。",
      "それは都市と農村の生活の詳細な描写で知られています。",
      "それは大きな橋の上での騒動、橋に衝突しそうな船で知られています。",
      "それは様々な交通手段の描写で知られています。",
      "それは宋時代の傑作として知られています。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "ManufacturedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "MemberOf": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "NamedAfter": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "OccurredAround": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "OccurredAt": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "OccurredBetween": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "OccurredDuring": [
      "それは北宋時代に起こりました。",
      "それは金代に起こりました。",
      "それは明代に起こりました。",
      "それは元代に起こりました。",
      "それは清代に起こりました。"
    ],
    "OccurredIn": [
      "それは汴京、現在の開封で起こりました。"
    ],
    "OccurredOn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "OriginatedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "PartOf": [
      "それは皇室コレクションの一部です。",
      "それは宋時代の一部です。"
    ],
    "PerformedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "ProducedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "PublishedAs": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "PublishedBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "PublishedIn": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "UsedAs": [
      "それは国宝として使用されています。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それは香港の中国返還10周年を記念するために使用されました。",
      "それは中国と日本の国交正常化40周年を記念するために使用されました。"
    ],
    "UsedIn": [
      "それは中国、日本、韓国、台湾、イギリス、北米、フランスの様々な美術館で使用されています。"
    ],
    "UsedTo": [
      "それは社会のあらゆる階層の人々の生活様式を明らかにするために使用されます。",
      "それは衣類や建築の様子を垣間見せるために使用されます。",
      "それは船、カート、市場、橋、城壁、通りを描写するために使用されます。",
      "それは「偉大な時代」に対する先近代の視聴者の様々な概念を視覚化するために使用されます。"
    ],
    "WonBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "WrittenBy": [
      "不明"
    ],
    "WrittenIn": [
      "不明"
    ]
  }
}

About: It is about the spirit and worldly commotion at the Qingming Festival.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Zhang Zeduan.
ConsistsOf: It consists of successive scenes revealing the lifestyle of all levels of the society from rich to poor as well as economic activities in both rural areas and the city, and offer glimpses of clothing and architecture.
CreatedBy: It was created by Zhang Zeduan.
CreatedIn: It was created in the Northern Song dynasty.
HasA: It has 25.5 centimetres in height and 5.25 meters long.
It has 814 humans, 28 boats, 60 animals, 30 buildings, 20 vehicles, 8 sedan chairs, and 170 trees.
It has about twenty women in the Song dynasty original.
It has a river meandering through the entire length.
It has a country path that broadens into a road and joins with the city road.
It has a city proper with gates.

It has businesses of all kinds selling wine, grain, secondhand goods, cookware, bows and arrows, lanterns, musical instruments, gold and silver, ornaments, dyed fabrics, paintings, medicine, needles, and artifacts.
It has many restaurants.
It has a great bridge, called the Rainbow Bridge or Shangdu Bridge.
It has a boat threatening to crash into the bridge.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by capturing the daily life of people and the landscape of the capital, Bianjing during the Northern Song.
It is characterized by revealing the lifestyle of all levels of the society from rich to poor as well as economic activities in both rural areas and the city.
It is characterized by offering glimpses of clothing and architecture.
It is characterized by being the most renowned work among all Chinese paintings.
It is characterized by having hundreds of replicas, copies of copies, and even forgeries made by artists of subsequent dynasties.
It is characterized by being a favorite of Puyi, the last emperor of China.
It is characterized by its delicate nature requiring intermittent exhibition for brief periods.
It is characterized by the countryside and the densely populated city as its two main sections.
It is characterized by depicting many economic activities, such as people loading cargoes onto the boat, shops, and even a tax office.
It is characterized by showing people from all walks of life.
HeldIn: It was held in the Forbidden City.
It was held at the Palace Museum in the Forbidden City.
It was held in museums in China, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, the United Kingdom, North America, and France.
It was held in the Museum of Applied Arts, Vienna in Austria.
It was held in the National Palace Museum in Taipei.
KnownAs: It is known as "China's Mona Lisa."
KnownFor: It is known for capturing the daily life of people and the landscape of the capital, Bianjing during the Northern Song.
It is known for its depiction of the spirit and worldly commotion at the Qingming Festival.
It is known for revealing the lifestyle of all levels of society and economic activities.
It is known for being the most renowned work among all Chinese paintings.
It is known for the hundreds of replicas and copies made by later artists.
It is known for being a favorite of the last emperor of China, Puyi.
It is known for its detailed depiction of urban and rural life.
It is known for the commotion on the great bridge where a boat threatens to crash.
It is known for its depiction of various modes of transportation.
It is known for being a masterpiece of the Song dynasty.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the Northern Song dynasty.
It occurred during the Jin dynasty.
It occurred during the Ming dynasty.
It occurred during the Yuan dynasty.
It occurred during the Qing dynasty.
OccurredIn: It occurred in Bianjing, present-day Kaifeng.
PartOf: It is part of the imperial collections.
It is part of the Song dynasty.
UsedAs: It is used as a national treasure.
UsedFor: It is used for commemorating the 10th anniversary of Hong Kong's transfer to the People's Republic of China.
It is used for marking the 40th anniversary of normalized diplomatic relations between China and Japan.
UsedIn: It is used in various museums in China, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, the United Kingdom, North America, and France.
UsedTo: It is used to reveal the lifestyle of all levels of the society.
It is used to offer glimpses of clothing and architecture.
It is used to depict boats, carts, markets, bridges, city walls, and streets.
It is used to visualize pre-modern viewers' various conceptions of a "great age."

それは門のある都市部があります。

それは田園地帯と人口密集した都市という2つの主要なセクションがあることが特徴です。
それは、人々が船に貨物を積み込む、店、さらには税務署などの多くの経済活動が描かれていることが特徴です。
それはあらゆる階層の人々が描かれていることが特徴です。

それは紫禁城の故宮博物院で保管されていました。

KnownFor: それは北宋時代の首都である汴京の人々の日常生活と風景を捉えていることで知られています。

それはすべての中国絵画の中で最も有名な作品であることで知られています。
それは後世の芸術家によって作られた何百もの複製やコピーで知られています。
それは中国最後の皇帝溥儀のお気に入りの作品であったことで知られています。
それは都市と農村の生活の詳細な描写で知られています。

それは中国と日本の国交正常化40周年を記念するために使用されました。
UsedIn: それは中国、日本、韓国、台湾、イギリス、北米、フランスの様々な美術館で使用されています。
UsedTo: それは社会のあらゆる階層の人々の生活様式を明らかにするために使用されます。
それは衣類や建築の様子を垣間見せるために使用されます。
それは船、カート、市場、橋、城壁、通りを描写するために使用されます。
それは「偉大な時代」に対する先近代の視聴者の様々な概念を視覚化するために使用されます。
